name: LoRaWAN
encryption: AES-128 (NwkSKey + AppSKey, derived from device keys)
summary: Star-of-stars: end devices talk to gateways which forward to a network server. Not a peer mesh.
why: Long-range low-power telemetry to the cloud — meters, sensors, asset trackers — managed by an operator.
tradeoffs: Centralized network server, gateways are infra you must run or rent. No node-to-node messaging.
